titleStmt.title: SII 28.277: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 277. (A.R. No. 431 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, central shrine, on the north base of the maṇḍapa in front.

p.hi: Vira-Kampaṇṇa-uḍaiyar Śaka 1297, Rākshasa, Vṛiśchika, śu. 11, Friday, Rōhiṇī. Irregular.

summary.p: It is stated that the controlling administrative authorities, śrī-rudrar, śrīmāhēśvarar, dēvakaṉmi and accountant of the temple (kōyiṟ-kaṇakkar) in the temple of Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār, the God (uḍaiyār) of Āṟagaḻūr in Āṟṟūr-kkūṟṟam in Malāḍu alias Jaṉanātha-vaḷanāḍu assembled in the Āṟaināyakaṉ-tirumaṇḍapam and granted the palamudal-kaṇkāṇippaṇi out of the several kaṇkāṇi-ppaṇis in the temple and a house-site along with appertaining privileges as kāṇi to Eṉṉuḍaiya-nāyaṉār, son of Māṟātena-uḷḷattiruindār alias Aghōra-Śiva-mudaliyār. This kāṇi was to be enjoyed by the grantee along with his brothers for all time.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanurāma mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran Arirāya vibhāṭan bhāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ catussamudrātipati śrīariyaṇṇa Uṭaiyar kumāraṉ śrīvirakampaṇṇa Uṭaiyar pradhivi Irājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa śakābdam
1000 2 100 9 10 7n mel rākṣasa varuṣattu vṛścika nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Urocaṇināḷ malāṭākiya jaṉanāta vaḷanāṭṭu Āṟṟūrk kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḻur Uṭaiyār tirukkāmīśvaram Uṭaiya nāya
ṉār tirukkoyilil śrīrūdrar śrīmāheśvarar tevakaṉmi koyiṟ kaṇakkar Ivvaṉaivarom Āṟaināyakaṉ tirumaṇṭapattu niṟaivaṟa niṟaintu kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu bhāradvāja gotrattu māṟāteṉa Uḷḷat
tiruntārāṉa Akoraciva mutaliyār makaṉ Eṉṉuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Ittirukkoyilil kaṇkāṇippaṇikaḷile Iṉṉāyaṉār Ivarkkuk kāṇiyākak kuṭuttaruḷiṉa palamutal kaṇkāṇippaṇiyum Ivarkku maṉaiyākak kuṭuttaru
ḷiṉa tirumaṭavaḷākattut teṟkil tiruvītiyil Āṇṭicciyār maṉaiyāy nampiyār tiruñāna campanta paṇṭitar koṇṭa maṉaikku meṟkum Uvaccaṉa periya Uṭaiyāṉ maṉaikkuk kiḻakkum Āka Itukku naṭuuṭpaṭṭa maṉaioṉṟum maṉaip
paṭappaiyum meṉokkiṉa maramum kīḻ nokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Uḷḷa cakala prāptikaḷum Urittāvatākavum Ivarum Ivaruṭaiya tampimārum Aṉupavittuk kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu cantrātittavaraiyum Aṉupavittu viṟṟum
Oṟṟi vaittuṅ koḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭi cammatittuk kuṭuttom Eṉṉuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku śrīrūdrar śrīmāheśvarar tevakaṉmikaḷ koyiṟ kaṇakkar Ivvaṉaivarom § Ivai mutaliyār Akoracivar Eḻuttu Ivai nāyaṉār
Eṉṉuṭaiya nāyaṉār Eḻuttu Ivai tirunīṟṟuvirar Eḻuttu Ivai taṭuttāṭkoṇṭa nāyaṉār Eḻuttu Ivai tiruñāṉa campantap piramārāyar Eḻuttu Ivai vaḷattār Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvekampam Uṭaiyār Eḻuttu Ivai Ikkoyil kaṇakku kāṇi
Uṭaiya neṭuvāyil Uṭaiyāṉ piccaṉ tirukāmīcarappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 28.277 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
